description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult female pedestrian with a fit physique, standing upright with arms slightly extended outward. She is dressed in athletic wear, consisting of a sleeveless sports top and fitted shorts, suitable for exercise or casual outdoor activities. Her feet are bare, and her posture is relaxed yet alert, as if ready to move or interact with her environment. The figure features short, slightly tousled hair and realistic body proportions. The surface of the model is smooth, with subtle anatomical details visible on the limbs and torso. The overall appearance suggests a healthy, active individual commonly seen in urban parks, sidewalks, or recreational areas.
description: A fit adult female in athletic wear, standing upright with arms outstretched and bare feet, featuring short hair and realistic body proportions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and the full design of the sports top and shorts, with arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the body, the contour of the limbs, and the side seam of the athletic outfit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the racerback style of the top, and the fit of the shorts.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, mirroring the left side with similar anatomical and clothing details.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic wear consisting of a sleeveless sports top and fitted shorts
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended outward
